repair_plan.repaired_text_preview:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

platform_type CYBER_EFFECTOR WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 0.1 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
   processor cyber_script WSF_CYBER_SCRIPT_EFFECT
   end_processor
end_platform_type

platform_type GROUND_TARGET WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 0.1 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
   processor target_proc WSF_SCRIPT_PROCESSOR
   end_processor
end_platform_type

platform blue_cyber CYBER_EFFECTOR
   side blue
   route
      position 30.68n 104.08e altitude 0 ft msl speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

platform red_target GROUND_TARGET
   side red
   route
      position 30.71n 104.13e altitude 0 ft msl speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

event_output file output/cyber_script_effect_demo.evt
   enable CYBER_ATTACK_INITIATED
   enable CYBER_ATTACK_SUCCEEDED
   enable CYBER_ATTACK_FAILED
   enable MESSAGE_TRANSMITTED
   enable MESSAGE_RECEIVED
end_event_output

event_pipe file output/cyber_script_effect_demo.aer
end_event_pipe

end_time 120 sec
